name: Juggernaut
description: Dual-view mod: layout mode on screen, full level + indicators via Spout2 for OBS.

enabled.name: Enable Juggernaut
enabled.description: Master toggle for the dual-view system.

spout-name.name: Spout Sender Name
spout-name.description: Name visible in OBS Spout2 Capture source.

show-fps.name: Show FPS (OBS)
show-fps.description: Show FPS counter on the Spout output.

show-cps.name: Show CPS (OBS)
show-cps.description: Show clicks-per-second on the Spout output.

show-progress.name: Show Progress (OBS)
show-progress.description: Show level progress % on the Spout output.
